body:
## Summary
- Add generic `facet` blocks to the meaning seed parser so a facet kind and every facet target resolve as seed meanings.
- Seed the semantic meta-language foundation: `semantic_facet`, `notation`, `annotation`, `denotation`, `connotation`, `semantic_gloss`, `external_knowledge_source`, and `cached_source_response`.
- Attach notation, annotation, denotation, and connotation facets to the root `link` meaning.
- Archive issue/PR evidence and online research under `docs/case-studies/issue-398`, then update `VISION.md`, `REQUIREMENTS.md`, and the changelog fragment.

## Reproduction and verification
- Pre-fix repro: `cargo test --test source semantic_facet -- --nocapture` failed because semantic facet parser/query APIs did not exist.
- `scripts/sync-seed.sh && scripts/sync-seed.sh --check`
- `cargo test --test source seed::meanings -- --nocapture`
- `cargo test semantic_facet -- --nocapture`
- `npm run --prefix tests/e2e check:language-test-coverage`
- `cargo fmt -- --check`
- `rust-script scripts/check-file-size.rs`
- `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features`
- `cargo test`
- `cargo test --doc`

## Research sources
- Wikidata data model: https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Help:Data_model
- Wikidata lexicographical data: https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Wikidata:Lexicographical_data/Documentation
- Wikimedia dumps: https://dumps.wikimedia.org/backup-index.html
- WordNet documentation: https://wordnet.princeton.edu/documentation
- SKOS Reference: https://www.w3.org/TR/skos-reference/
- OntoLex-Lemon: https://www.w3.org/2016/04/ontolex/

Fixes #398

comments.body:
<!-- hive-mind:working-session-summary -->
## Working session summary

Implemented and finalized PR #399: https://github.com/link-assistant/formal-ai/pull/399

The PR is now ready for review, branch `issue-398-b349f91c312f` is clean, and the latest CI/CD run passed on commit `68454a84`.

What changed:
- Added recursive semantic facets for meanings: `notation`, `annotation`, `denotation`, `connotation`.
- Added seed support and parser/API access for nested `facet` blocks.
- Added multilingual semantic meta seed entries for `en`, `ru`, `hi`, and `zh`.
- Updated `VISION.md`, `REQUIREMENTS.md`, changelog, and issue case-study docs.
- Added regression/unit/source tests covering semantic facet parsing and resolution.

Verification:
- Local checks passed: seed sync/check, focused source tests, semantic facet tests, language coverage check, fmt, clippy, full `cargo test`, and doc tests.
- Investigated the earlier CI failure from run `27072524576`; it failed language test coverage because only `tests/source` changed. Added CI-recognized unit tests, then reran CI successfully in run `27072667121`.

Research sources documented in the PR include Wikidata, Wikimedia dumps, WordNet, SKOS, and OntoLex:
https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Help:Data_model
https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Wikidata:Lexicographical_data/Documentation
https://dumps.wikimedia.org/backup-index.html
https://wordnet.princeton.edu/documentation
https://www.w3.org/TR/skos-reference/
https://www.w3.org/2016/04/ontolex/

title: Add recursive semantic facets to meaning seed
